description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the registry.gitlab.com/mindroot/baseimage:latest Docker image with a postgres:10.1 service and the variables BUNDLE_APP_CONFIG, BUNDLE_PATH, DB_HOST, DB_PASSWORD, DB_USER, DOCKER_DRIVER, DOCKER_HOST, GEM_HOME, and GEM_PATH. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs "bundle check || bundle install", then "bundle exec rake db:create RAILS_ENV=test", then "bundle exec rspec". In the deploy stage add a production job that only runs on the master branch, executes "export PATH=$PATH:/gembox/bin", then "gem install dpl", then "dpl --provider=heroku --app=mind-quests --api-key=$HEROKU_PRODUCTION_API_KEY" to deploy to Heroku. No caches or artifacts are defined.
